rationale: Educ. Code §32.102 governs school district transfers of data processing equipment to students. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 32.102. AUTHORITY. (a) As provided by this subchapter, a school district or open-enrollment charter school may transfer to a student enrolled in the district or school:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns data processing equipment transfers, unrelated to homestead exemptions.
